name: finance-portfolio-manager
description: A simplified, public double-entry finance app with anonymous per-visitor sessions.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
